text.title: REST API Design Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: E-commerce REST API v1
example.note: resources: /v1/products, /v1/orders, /v1/orders/{id}/items. version_strategy=path. error_format=problem_json (types like https://api.example.com/errors/payment-declined). pagination=cursor (?cursor=eyJ...). status_codes covers 200/201/204/400/401/403/404/409/422/429/500. auth_model=OAuth2 Bearer. SDK codegen via OpenAPI is clean; clients retry on 5xx; rate-limited callers get 429+Retry-After.

example.title: RPC-disguised-as-REST audit
example.note: Routes /api/getProduct, /api/doRefund; 200 OK with {error:...} bodies; offset pagination for orders. Decision tree caught nouns-not-verbs + 200-on-error + offset-pagination-at-scale → migrate to /v1/products + status codes + cursor pagination.
